items.title: Resume

items.content_html:
About me!

My name is Minh Duc.

You can pronounce it as “Min” and “Duc” - where “Duc” sounds like “Duck”. The name “Duc” carries profound meanings in Vietnamese culture, representing virtues like morality, talent, and leadership qualities, which I strive to embody in both my personal and professional life.

I am currently a third-year Information Technology student at the University of Information Technology (UIT), VNU. As I progress through my academic journey, I’m building a strong foundation in computer science fundamentals while exploring cutting-edge technologies that shape our digital future. And, I aim to become an MLOps Engineer in the future.

Besides, I love learning Math, code, computer, games, League of Legends, manga, swimming, gym and orca.

About this blog

This blog simply shares my life journey.
items.title: Hello World

items.content_html:
Introduction

This project is a deep learning-based application for recognizing Japanese characters in manga images. It helps extract and identify Japanese text from manga pages, supporting language learning and text digitization.

Result

Experimental Results of Text Recognition Methods

Convergence Curves of SVTR

Convergence Curves of SVTR

Convergence Curve of TrOCR
items.summary: Deep learning-based Japanese character recognition in Manga.
items.title: Japanese Character Recognition in Manga (Manga OCR)

items.content_html:
Introduction

EcoWaste is a web application that manages waste information and uses OpenAI APIs to classify waste from images, helping users sort waste correctly and raise environmental awareness.

Demo video
items.summary: Waste management system with AI-powered waste classification.
items.title: EcoWaste
